inputs.name: $internal
inputs.description: Contains the fields that are populated and used internally while loading the data. Important: This parameter is reserved for internal use by Integration Server . Do not modify or delete the value of this parameter.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Contains the field(s) for which you want to fetch the data from the data source. The field(s) in this document must be same as the field(s) in the key document of Dataloader service input signature. For more information on Dataloader service, see IBM webMethods Service Development Help .

inputs.name: loaderName
inputs.description: Specifies the name of the Dataloader .

outputs.name: $internal
outputs.description: Document containing the fields, which are used internally by Dataloader .
